name: Alluring Teardrop Drop Earrings
description: These enchanting 22 Karat gold drop earrings feature an artistic design that forms the shape of a teardrop with a pearl-shaped bead hanging at the bottom.

name: Yellow Gold Necklace Set
description:
22 Karat Yellow Gold Necklace Set with Teardrop Design and Rawa Balls

This 22 Karat yellow gold Necklace set consist of a pair of drop earrings and a necklace. The front design of the necklace showcases clusters of Rawa balls, stylised leaves and a teardrop pendant. Open filigree work, diamond-cut patterns and Rawa balls adorn the teardrop motif. The chain on the front is connected to the chains at the back through O-rings. One of the circular chain ends features a J-hook for fastening purpose. The earring design features mini teardrop elements, two stylised leaves and Rawa balls on the base. Through an O-ring, a teardrop element, which matches the design of the pendant, is suspended. The earrings are safe and comfortable to wear as they are fitted with screw posts and Bombay screw closures. Due to its high-polished finished, the necklace set looks shiny.

name: Melody Diamond Finger Ring
description:
Chic 18 Karat yellow gold Finger Ring with a graceful swirl design, enhanced by shimmering Diamonds.

This sophisticated Finger Ring features a unique swirl design that elegantly wraps around the finger. Perfect for special occasions, engagements, or as a fashionable everyday accessory.

name: Geometric Chic Gold & Diamond Necklace
description: Delight in the beauty of this 18 Kt yellow gold necklace, features a stunning geometric design with intricate detailing that drapes gracefully across the neckline. Perfect for a contemporary touch.

name: Soft Radiance Diamond Necklace Set
description:
Like poetry traced in gold, this 18 Karat yellow gold sculpted necklace set wraps her in layered vines, floating natural Diamonds, and the softness of sheer jali light.

For nights that feel like a dream remembered, this two-layered marvel Necklace Set drapes her in sculpted vines, floating pav natural Diamonds, and delicate 3D jali. Its matte-finished grace mirrors her elegance, unfolding softly at brunches or receptions. As the clasp clicks into place, so does your confidence- layered, luminous, and absolutely flauntworthy.

description:

Ideal for a casual day out or a festive occasion, this intricate floral Finger Ring brings a touch of nature�s beauty to your finger. Its delicate design and high craftsmanship make it a piece to cherish daily.

description:
